sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, str_col VARCHAR(50), num_col INT, date_col DATE);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, str_col, num_col, date_col) VALUES (1, 'test', 10, '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, str_col, num_col, date_col) VALUES (2, 'example', NULL, '2023-01-02');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, str_col, num_col, date_col) VALUES (3, '', 100, NULL);
SELECT LEFT(str_col, NOT (num_col > 50)) AS left_str FROM test_table WHERE NOT (num_col IS NULL) GROUP BY left_str HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id, LEFT(str_col, COUNT(num_col)) AS extracted FROM test_table WHERE NOT (id = 2) ORDER BY extracted;

SELECT a.id, LEFT(a.str_col, 3) AS prefix, b.num_col FROM test_table AS a JOIN (SELECT id, LEFT(str_col, 1) AS prefix FROM test_table WHERE NOT (str_col IS NULL)) AS b ON a.id = b.id WHERE NOT (a.str_col = '');
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT LEFT(str_col, 1) FROM test_table) AS subquery GROUP BY id HAVING NOT (COUNT(*) < 1);
SELECT LEFT((SELECT str_col FROM test_table WHERE id = 3), 2) AS short_str WHERE NOT (short_str IS NULL);
SELECT LEFT(str_col, (CASE WHEN num_col IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE num_col END)) AS conditional_left FROM test_table WHERE NOT (str_col = '');
